info.description: Bilingual CMS backend API for Impress (印迹). Supports content management, articles, pages, themes, media, and more.
info.title: Impress CMS API

get.description: Returns page view statistics including today, last 7 days, last 30 days, and unique visitors
Returns paginated articles including drafts for admin management

post.description: Create a new article (draft by default)

get.description: Returns a single article by its database ID

put.description: Update an existing article by ID

delete.description: Permanently delete an article by ID

get.description: Returns the article as a Markdown file with YAML front matter
Returns paginated audit events with optional filters
Returns all backup records

post.description: Generate a full site export as a ZIP archive

get.description: Download a site export ZIP file

post.description: Upload a ZIP archive and restore the full site
Upload a ZIP and validate its structure without importing
Manually trigger a database backup

get.description: Returns all categories for admin management

post.description: Create a new category

get.description: Returns categories organized in a parent-child tree structure
Returns a single category by its database ID

put.description: Update an existing category by ID

get.description: Returns paginated comments with optional status filtering

put.description: Set or unset the pinned flag on a comment

patch.description: Approve, reject, or mark a comment as spam

get.description: Returns the draft config for a given page key

put.description: Updates the draft config for a page key with optimistic locking via If-Match header

parameters.description: Expected draft version for optimistic locking
parameters.name: If-Match

post.description: Promotes the current draft to published state with optimistic locking
Rolls back published content to a previous version
Validates a page config and returns translation status without saving

get.description: Returns a paginated list of published versions for a page key
Returns the config snapshot for a specific published version
Returns paginated form submissions with optional filters

post.description: Update the status of multiple form submissions at once

get.description: Returns submission counts grouped by status
Returns a single form submission

delete.description: Soft-delete a form submission by ID

patch.description: Update the status of a single form submission

get.description: Returns paginated list of uploaded media files

post.description: Upload an image file via multipart form data

delete.description: Remove a media file and its database record

post.description: Replaces the physical file for an existing media item with a new cropped version

put.description: Updates the display filename of a media item

get.description: Returns a list of pages and articles that reference the given media item
Returns all menu groups

post.description: Create a new menu group

get.description: Returns a menu group with its items as a flat list

put.description: Update a menu group's name and slug

delete.description: Delete a menu group and its items

post.description: Create a new menu item within a menu group

put.description: Set the display order of menu items in a group

delete.description: Delete a menu item by ID

put.description: Set a menu group as the primary navigation menu

get.description: Returns pages with optional status, parentId, and themeId filters

post.description: Create a new page (draft by default)

get.description: Returns a single page by its database ID

put.description: Update an existing page by ID
Set a page's status to published
Revert a page's status back to draft

post.description: Rebuild the full-text search index from scratch

get.description: Returns the robots.txt content for admin editing
Returns all tags for admin management

post.description: Create a new tag

put.description: Update an existing tag by ID

get.description: Returns draft and published theme token configurations

put.description: Update theme design tokens with optimistic locking

get.description: Returns all installed themes

post.description: Install a new external theme

get.description: Returns a single installed theme

put.description: Set a theme as the active theme and seed its pages

get.description: Returns paginated list of users

post.description: Create a new user with username, password, and role

get.description: Returns a single user by ID

put.description: Update user profile, password, role, or permissions

delete.description: Delete a user by ID (cannot delete self or last super admin)

post.description: Authenticate with username and password, receive JWT access + refresh tokens
Invalidate the refresh token to log out

get.description: Returns profile of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token

get.description: Returns the currently active installed theme
Returns paginated published articles with optional category/tag filtering
Returns a single published article with full content
Returns active theme, tokens, pages, global config in a single response

parameters.description: Optional page key to include content
parameters.name: pageKey

get.description: Returns all categories that are not hidden from public listing
Returns a category by slug with paginated published articles
Returns paginated approved comments for a given content item

post.description: Submit a new comment on content (subject to anti-spam checks)

get.description: Returns published-only content for a given page key with locale support and records page view
get.summary: Get public content by page key

post.description: Submit a public contact/inquiry form

get.description: Returns the primary menu group with items as a nested tree
Returns all published pages with optional locale filtering
Returns a single published page with config and SEO data
Returns the current robots.txt content
Full-text search across articles and pages
Returns autocomplete suggestions for a search prefix
Returns all tags for public display
Returns a tag by slug with paginated published articles
Returns the published theme design tokens (colors, fonts, layout)
Returns published pages associated with the currently active theme
Returns an XML sitemap with all published pages
